title: Stamp the per-file layout into `src/template` (fresh-Instance path)
description: Src-First: land the new per-record schema, the `to-execution issue/sprint` CLI, the channel-guard hook + its `hooks-config` flag, and the empty `.excn/issues/` layout in `src/template` so a freshly-stamped Instance starts in the per-file world with no `backlog.json` ever. The fresh path must not error on an empty issues directory.
acceptance_criteria: A fresh `npx to-execution init` stamps the per-record schema, the issue/sprint CLI, and the channel-guard hook + flag
A fresh Instance has an empty `.excn/issues/` and no `backlog.json`; nothing errors on the empty directory
The stamped `.gitignore` keeps `.excn/issues/*.json` tracked (not caught by the `*_progress.json` ignore) — phantom-wipe class
Changes land in `src/` first; the root Instance mirrors afterward (Src-First)
package-qa and code-standards gates pass on the stamped output
